title: Jiban Trishna
desc: Rajnath, a millionaire's son infamous for being a womaniser, falls in love with Shakuntala, a poor artist. However, Shakuntala's godbrother, who hates rich people, does not approve of Rajnath.

title: Jeevan Trishna
desc: A powerful narrative examining how social and emotional conflicts push individuals to fight for dignity, truth, and belonging while overcoming the hurdles life puts in their way.

desc: Love, tradition, and societal struggles play out in a compelling story filled with heartfelt emotions and challenges.

title: Adi Shakti Adyapeeth
desc: Annadacharan Bhattacharya had a divine vision and found an idol in Kolkata. This miracle made him famous and people called him Annada Thakur from then on.

title: Khonar Kahini
desc: Khona's tale blends mythology and history, following the legendary astrologer-poet who challenged societal norms with wisdom and wit in medieval Bengal's patriarchal culture.

title: Police Filez
desc: This show shares real cases of crime, like harassment and kidnapping. Watch dramatic re-enactments of the cases. A host guides you through each gripping story.

title: Moner Manush
desc: When his family abandons him because of an illness, Lalon, a Bengali poet and philosopher, is rescued by a Muslim community. He later forms a cult called baul.
